approaches.title: Brute Force with Nested Loops
approaches.summary: Iterate over all possible rotations using nested loops to compute the sum for each rotation.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial brute force approach with O(n²) time complexity, leading to TLE.

approaches.title: Mathematical Optimization with Incremental Sum
approaches.summary: Derive a formula to compute each rotation's sum incrementally from the previous one, reducing time complexity to O(n).

revisions.commitComment: oh right multiplication is just addition...
revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 396: oh right multiplication is just addition...
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized solution using mathematical insight to avoid recomputation, achieving O(n) time and O(1) space.
